sentences.target: Ich habe einen Strafzettel am Auto bekommen.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈhaːbə ˈaɪ̯nən ˈʃtʁaːfˌtsɛtl̩ am ˈaʊ̯to bəˈkɔmən/

translations.de: Ich habe einen Strafzettel am Auto bekommen.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈhaːbə ˈaɪ̯nən ˈʃtʁaːfˌtsɛtl̩ am ˈaʊ̯to bəˈkɔmən/
translations.en: I got a parking ticket on the car.
translations.es: Me pusieron una multa de estacionamiento.
translations.fr: J’ai eu une amende de stationnement sur ma voiture.
translations.it: Mi hanno messo una multa sul parabrezza.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在车上被贴了张违停罚单。
translations.vi: Xe tôi bị dán vé phạt đỗ xe.
translations.hi: मेरी कार पर पार्किंग का चालान लग गया।
translations.nb: Jeg fikk en parkeringsbot på bilen.
translations.id: Saya kena tilang parkir di mobil.
translations.sv: Jag fick en parkeringsbot på bilen.
translations.ro: Am primit o amendă de parcare pe mașină.
translations.da: Jeg fik en parkeringsbøde på bilen.
translations.ja: 車に駐車違反の切符を切られた。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite auxiliary (present, 1sg) forming the perfect with the past participle 'bekommen'.
Indefinite article, masculine accusative singular; determiner of 'Strafzettel'.
Common noun; direct object in the accusative.
Preposition (contraction of 'an dem'); introduces a dative PP indicating location.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'am', dative neuter singular.
Main verb in past participle form; complements the auxiliary to form the perfect.

sentences.target: Da liegt ein Strafzettel unter dem Scheibenwischer.
sentences.reading: /da liːkt aɪ̯n ˈʃtʁaːfˌtsɛtl̩ ˈʊntɐ deːm ˈʃaɪ̯bənˌvɪʃɐ/

translations.de: Da liegt ein Strafzettel unter dem Scheibenwischer.
translations.ipa: /da liːkt aɪ̯n ˈʃtʁaːfˌtsɛtl̩ ˈʊntɐ deːm ˈʃaɪ̯bənˌvɪʃɐ/
translations.en: There's a parking ticket under the windshield wiper.
translations.es: Hay una multa debajo del limpiaparabrisas.
translations.fr: Il y a un PV sous l’essuie-glace.
translations.it: C’è una multa sotto il tergicristallo.
translations.zh-Hans: 雨刷下面夹着一张罚单。
translations.yue: 雨刮下面夾住咗張抄牌。
translations.pt: Há uma multa debaixo do limpador do para-brisa.
translations.tr: Sileceklerin altında bir park cezası var.
translations.vi: Có một vé phạt dưới cần gạt mưa.
translations.ar: هناك مخالفة تحت ماسحة الزجاج الأمامي.
translations.nl: Er zit een bon onder de ruitenwisser.
translations.hu: Egy bírságcédula van az ablaktörlő alatt.
translations.hi: वाइपर के नीचे पार्किंग का चालान रखा है।
translations.el: Υπάρχει κλήση κάτω από τον υαλοκαθαριστήρα.
translations.nb: Det ligger en bot under vindusviskeren.
translations.id: Ada surat tilang di bawah wiper.
translations.sv: Det sitter en bot under vindrutetorkaren.
translations.da: Der ligger en bøde under vinduesviskeren.
translations.ja: ワイパーの下に違反切符が挟まっている。

tokens.explanation: Deictic adverb indicating location; sets the scene ('there').
Finite main verb (present, 3sg); describes position/state ('is lying').
Indefinite article, nominative masculine singular; determiner of the subject.
Common noun; grammatical subject in the nominative.
Preposition; governs dative here to mark spatial relation.
Definite article, masculine dative singular; determiner of 'Scheibenwischer'.
Common noun; object of the preposition 'unter' in the dative.

sentences.target: Du kannst den Strafzettel bitte später bezahlen.
sentences.reading: /du kanst deːn ˈʃtʁaːfˌtsɛtl̩ ˈbɪtə ˈʃpɛːtɐ bəˈtsaːlən/

translations.de: Du kannst den Strafzettel bitte später bezahlen.
translations.ipa: /du kanst deːn ˈʃtʁaːfˌtsɛtl̩ ˈbɪtə ˈʃpɛːtɐ bəˈtsaːlən/
translations.es: Por favor, paga la multa más tarde.
translations.fr: Paie l’amende plus tard, s’il te plaît.
translations.it: Per favore paga la multa più tardi.
translations.yue: 麻煩你遲啲先交張罰單。
translations.pt: Por favor, paga a multa mais tarde.
translations.he: בבקשה תשלם את הדו"ח אחר כך.
translations.vi: Làm ơn nộp vé phạt sau.
translations.hu: Kérlek, később fizesd be a bírságot.
translations.hi: कृपया चालान बाद में भर देना।
translations.ro: Te rog să plătești amenda mai târziu.
translations.fi: Ole hyvä ja maksa sakko myöhemmin.
translations.ja: 切符はあとで払ってね。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 2nd person singular nominative; subject.
Modal auxiliary (present, 2sg); selects bare infinitive 'bezahlen' and expresses ability/permission.
Definite article, masculine accusative singular; determiner of 'Strafzettel'.
Common noun; direct object in the accusative.
Politeness adverb/particle; modifies the clause to mark a polite request.
Temporal adverb indicating a later time.
Main lexical verb in bare infinitive; complements modal 'kannst'.

sentences.target: Mein Bruder hat gestern einen Strafzettel kassiert.
sentences.reading: /maɪ̯n ˈbʁuːdɐ hat ˈɡɛstɐn ˈaɪ̯nən ˈʃtʁaːfˌtsɛtl̩ kasˈiːɐ̯t/

translations.de: Mein Bruder hat gestern einen Strafzettel kassiert.
translations.ipa: /maɪ̯n ˈbʁuːdɐ hat ˈɡɛstɐn ˈaɪ̯nən ˈʃtʁaːfˌtsɛtl̩ kasˈiːɐ̯t/
translations.en: My brother got a parking ticket yesterday.
translations.es: Mi hermano recibió una multa de estacionamiento ayer.
translations.fr: Mon frère a pris une amende de stationnement hier.
translations.it: Mio fratello ha preso una multa per parcheggio ieri.
translations.zh-Hans: 我兄弟昨天被贴了张违停罚单。
translations.yue: 我阿哥尋日畀人抄咗牌。
translations.ru: Мой брат вчера получил штраф за парковку.
translations.pt: Meu irmão levou uma multa de estacionamento ontem.
translations.vi: Anh trai tôi bị dán vé phạt đỗ xe hôm qua.
translations.ar: أخي حصل على مخالفة وقوف أمس.
translations.nl: Mijn broer kreeg gisteren een parkeerboete.
translations.uk: Мій брат учора отримав штраф за паркування.
translations.hu: A testvérem tegnap parkolási bírságot kapott.
translations.hi: मेरे भाई को कल पार्किंग का चालान मिला।
translations.pl: Mój brat wczoraj dostał mandat za parkowanie.
translations.el: Ο αδελφός μου πήρε κλήση χθες.
translations.nb: Broren min fikk parkeringsbot i går.
translations.id: Saudara laki-laki saya kemarin kena tilang parkir.
translations.sv: Min bror fick en parkeringsbot i går.
translations.ro: Fratele meu a primit o amendă de parcare ieri.
translations.cs: Můj bratr včera dostal pokutu za parkování.
translations.da: Min bror fik en parkeringsbøde i går.
translations.ja: 兄が昨日駐車違反の切符を切られた。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner; modifies 'Bruder' (nominative singular).
Common noun; subject of the clause in the nominative.
Finite auxiliary (present, 3sg); forms the perfect with 'kassiert'.
Temporal adverb; modifies the clause.
Indefinite article, masculine accusative singular; determiner of 'Strafzettel'.
Common noun; direct object in the accusative.
Main verb in past participle; colloquial usage meaning 'to get/receive (a ticket)'.
